changelog: v4.0.1: Patch release. UI polish: System Score tile now has a dynamic border that tracks the ring color and glows silver at 100, with less-cramped internal spacing. Home pipeline callouts (Windows OS, CPU, Memory, GPU, Network, Storage, Devices) are now clickable again. Fixes FnAudio page leak that let non-Fortnite licensees access paid Audio content. Hardens null guards around Process.Start for powercfg detection and the game detection continuation. ExpandNavGroup re-applies the dimmed foreground to license-locked nav items when a group is expanded. FastPowerPlan installer no longer hangs at a Read-Host prompt when launched under -Auto. LoadComplexityLevel logs parse failures instead of silently defaulting. Adds NVIDIA 596.21 Game Ready Driver to driver intelligence.
